title: GitHub Actions Execution Model, Contexts, and State Boundaries · Pipeline Repair Bay
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective workflow execution and state trace; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in github actions execution model, contexts, and state boundaries, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in workflow execution and state trace and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Trace event, workflow run, job graph, runner allocation, step process, action execution, and post-step cleanup for one commit.
Distinguish server-side contexts and expression evaluation from runner-side environment expansion, shell parsing, and process state.
Classify workspace files, step outputs, job outputs, environment files, artifacts, caches, summaries, logs, and external releases by scope and lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-run-identity-attempt-evidence-6euv4m". Tailor its execution-trace.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence, keep Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-run-identity-attempt-evidence-6euv4m
  - competency: ci-run-identity-attempt-evidence
    artifact: execution-trace.yaml
    decision: run identity attempt evidence
    environment: trusted release tag requiring an environment approval
    fault-injection: change the event from pull_request to pull_request_target
    retained-proof: artifact ID SHA-256 producer retention and verified download layout
    case-key: 6euv4m
    change: |
      event: pull_request
      workflow-ref: owner/repo/.github/workflows/ci.yml@refs/pull/42/merge
      run-id: 8842
      run-attempt: 2
      job-runner: fresh-ubuntu-24.04
      step-process: isolated-shell
      state-handoff: validated-job-output
      retained-artifact: test-report-digest
    verify: compare event payload workflow ref workflow sha run id attempt runner and artifact metadata
    failure: Reject shared-runner assumptions, branch-only identity, or cache and artifact state treated as equivalent.
    repair: Trace server and runner evaluation, name each state lifetime, and retain exact run and artifact identity.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
